form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 2nd over 400m at this track beaten 0.8 lengths (22.83) behind Hong Kong Phooey in a Grade 5 on April 2. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card at the latest appearance. Worth following up.
